name: Spinach Pecan Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place pecans on a cookie sheet and roast until lightly browned and aromatic, about 5 minutes. Let cool.
3. In a food processor, combine half of the spinach with olive oil, remaining ingredients, and process until smooth.
4. Add the remaining spinach gradually until all has been incorporated.
5. Serve over hot, fresh pasta.
